title: hieracium neocerinthe subsp. compositum
intro: Hieracium neocerinthe subsp. compositum is a type of flowering plant, commonly known as Hawkweed, which belongs to the dandelion family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and infections. The health benefits of Hieracium neocerinthe subsp. compositum include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or salves, allowing for various applications in traditional medicine.
